creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
I just installed the pkg_version port with the patches
	mentioned on -hackers (Message-ID:
	<19990927080912.A2944@kilt.nothing-going-on.org>), and
	i thought i might as well submit this change...  I also
	changed it to explicitly look for pkg_info in /usr/sbin
	so it also works when i haven't yet su'd (and don't have
	that dir in my PATH).

How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
